item.name: Auth

request.description: Provides capabilities to log a given user into COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service.

response.name: 400 Error

request.description: Provides capabilities for a new user of COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service to create a new account

response.name: 500 Error
400 Error

item.description: Contains all API requests for authenticating to COMP3011-CWK1 REST API service.

item.name: Data
Admin

formdata.description: A CSV file containing the yearly PPD data. Such files can be found here: can be found here: https://www.gov.uk/government/statistical-data-sets/price-paid-data-downloads.

request.description: Uploads a PPD Year document to the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service. The yearly datasets that can be uploaded to this endpoint can be found here: [https://www.gov.uk/government/statistical-data-sets/price-paid-data-downloads](https://www.gov.uk/government/statistical-data-sets/price-paid-data-downloads).

response.name: 500 Error

query.description: The UUID of the PPD transaction you wish to delete.

request.description: Deletes a PPD transaction with a given ID from the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service.

response.name: 500 Error

request.description: Updates a given PPD transaction from the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service.

response.name: 500 Error

item.description: Contains requests that only the admin user of the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service can invoke.

query.description: The date to start the query in the data from, in the format YEAR-MONTH-DAY (e.g., 2025-08-20).
The date to end the query in the data from, in the format YEAR-MONTH-DAY (e.g., 2025-08-20).
The number of results to return.

request.description: Returns the top (limit) UK locations with the cheapest property data on average from the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service.

query.description: The date to start the query in the data from, in the format YEAR-MONTH-DAY (e.g., 2025-08-20).
The date to end the query in the data from, in the format YEAR-MONTH-DAY (e.g., 2025-08-20).
The number of results to return.
A valid UK postcode. E.g., LN22 5HD.

request.description: Returns the average property price in a given postcode area from the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service.

item.name: Average Property Price By Property Type and Town/City

query.description: The town/city to find the average property price for (capitalised). E.g., LONDON.
The property type to find the average property price for. E.g., D for Detatched, S for Semi-Detatched, F for Flat, T for Terraced.

request.description: Returns the average price of UK property of a given type, in a given town/city from the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service.

query.description: The page of transactions we wish to retrieve. E.g., 2.
The number of transactions we wish to retrieve per page. E.g., 100.

request.description: Returns all PPD transactions from the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service. Note that this API has pagination enabled to limit rates.

response.name: 500 Error
200 Ok

query.description: The page of transactions we wish to retrieve. E.g., 2.
The number of transactions we wish to retrieve per page. E.g., 100.

request.description: Given a transaction UUID, this API returns the full PPD transaction from from the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service.

item.description: Contains all requests to allow a user of the COMP3011-CWK1 REST API web service to perform CRUD operations on PPD data records stored in the system.
